sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49917" key="i)/dmwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἴδμων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἴδμεν</foreign>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εἰδέναι</foreign>) <sense id="n49917.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having knowledge of</tr_> a thing, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">εὐνομίης ἴ. πόλις</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.575</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Leont.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
